author: jameshe5018
content: Do we have a pr on beacon apis for this? your other pr https://github.com/ethereum/keymanager-APIs/pull/87 also affects it, i assume min bid and builder boost factor should be part of it

author: jvranek
content: yea definitely think the beacon api needs to carry these values up to be consistent (e.g., proxy as well) but think there's just flux on the direction like whether it should be Luca / Potuz's approach
